title: E-Commerce SEO Audit & Recovery Plan
description: Conducted a comprehensive technical SEO audit for a mid-market e-commerce platform experiencing a 40% organic traffic drop after a site migration. Identified 127 critical issues including broken canonical chains, missing hreflang tags, and crawl budget waste. Delivered a prioritized recovery roadmap that restored rankings within 8 weeks.

title: Marketing Dashboard Redesign
description: Redesigned a legacy marketing analytics dashboard used by 200+ internal stakeholders. Replaced a cluttered jQuery-based UI with a responsive React interface featuring real-time data visualizations, customizable widget grids, and dark mode support. Reduced page load time by 62% and improved SUS score from 58 to 84.

title: Competitive Landscape Analysis — Fintech SaaS
description: Performed an in-depth competitive research study across 14 fintech SaaS products in the APAC market. Analyzed feature matrices, pricing models, user reviews, and GTM strategies. Produced a 45-page report with actionable recommendations that informed the product roadmap for Q1 2026.

title: REST API for Activity Logging Service
description: Designed and built a RESTful API for an internal activity logging microservice handling 50k+ events per day. Implemented JWT authentication, rate limiting, pagination, and structured error responses following RFC 7807. Wrote comprehensive integration tests achieving 94% code coverage.

title: Brand Identity System for Tech Startup
description: Developed a complete brand identity system for an early-stage AI startup, including logo design, typography scale, color palette, iconography set, and component library guidelines. Delivered a 60-page brand book and Figma component kit adopted by the entire product and marketing team.

title: Local SEO Optimization for Multi-Location Retail Chain
description: Audited and optimized Google Business Profiles for 23 retail locations across three states. Standardized NAP data, resolved duplicate listings, implemented a review response workflow, and built local landing pages. Achieved a 34% increase in Google Maps impressions and 28% growth in direction requests within 90 days.

title: Interactive Data Visualization Explorer
description: Built an interactive data explorer allowing users to filter, sort, and visualize a 2M-row public dataset through choropleth maps, scatter plots, and time-series charts. Implemented Web Workers for background computation and IndexedDB for client-side caching to maintain 60fps interactions.
